findings.evidence: snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:105 states it is 'Quarter past nine'; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:119 says the stairwell sequence is 'getting close to midnight.'
findings.problem: The return from the sub-collection picks up an impossible multi-hour gap inside what is written as one continuous walk back to Hufflepuff. That breaks internal chronology and undercuts trust in the chapter's scene handling at the exact point where discovery should be carrying into aftermath.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:105 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:119, reconcile the clock. Either move the watch-check later in the descent or change the stairwell note so the trip remains a same-evening walk measured in minutes, not hours. Preserve the late-night December cold, but the route from the sub-collection to the common room must read as one continuous return.
findings.acceptance_test: Reading snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:105, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:111, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:119, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:123, a reader can track one uninterrupted trip from the sub-collection to the common room without any implied two-plus-hour jump.

findings.evidence: snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:179 explicitly frames Ffion's charm as 'the same kind of structure' Gavin first saw at breakfast; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:201 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:207 turn the coda into another summary of scale rather than a new consequence.
findings.problem: The closing common-room scene knowingly restages Gavin's earlier Levitation-Charm insight instead of converting the Builders and planetary-ward revelation into a fresh dramatic turn. The chapter ends on intelligent recap, but not on a consequence commensurate with how much the world has just widened.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:179, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:201, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:203, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:207 so the Ffion coda produces a consequence unique to this discovery. Gavin should attempt something, fail to say something, mis-handle an ordinary interaction because of the new scale, or make a concrete choice altered by what he now knows; do not let the scene stop at reiterating the cosmology.
findings.acceptance_test: In the revised closing span anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:179, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:201, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:207, the Builders revelation causes an observable new action, failed action, or relational shift on the page. If Gavin only thinks a more detailed version of what he already learned, this finding is not fixed.

findings.evidence: snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:61, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:65, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:67 explain the Builders' departure through repeated 'not' constructions; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:91, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:101, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:103 do the same for the wards.
findings.problem: The central discovery passages lean too hard on recursive negation and corrective scaffolding. Used this densely, the prose circles the concept by saying what it is not instead of landing it once with fresh, concrete specificity, which blunts the uncanny force the style bible calls for.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten and vary the explanatory runs at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:61, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:65, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:67, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:91, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:101, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:103. Let one negation establish the limit, then pivot to a positive image, bodily effect, or spatial consequence Gavin can actually register.
findings.acceptance_test: Reading the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:61, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:67, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:91, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:101, no stretch of three consecutive sentences should rely on 'not X / not Y / not because' elimination as the main explanatory engine; each passage must include at least one sentence that positively renders what Gavin perceives or feels.

findings.evidence: snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:113 repeats the same 'thin agreement about what...' construction three times in one paragraph; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:201 returns to the same top-layer/thin-skin explanatory vocabulary in the coda.
findings.problem: A key explanatory paragraph turns mechanical through formula reuse. The repeated agreement syntax and recycled layer/skin metaphor family flatten the prose into a generated-seeming pattern instead of letting Gavin's perception keep surprising the reader.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:113, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:115, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:201, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:205 to vary the sentence shapes and select fewer examples. Keep at most one overtly explanatory agreement sentence, then shift the rest to distinct sensory anchors or distinct syntactic forms rather than another top-layer restatement.
findings.acceptance_test: In the revised paragraphs anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:113 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:201, the exact 'thin agreement about what...' frame appears no more than once, and the later common-room paragraph does not reuse the same layer or skin metaphor family to restate the point.

summary: FAIL on award, craft, and prose; PASS on dialogue. Gavin's spoken scene with Ffion is natural, contracted, and character-true, but the chapter drops a major chronology error on the walk back from the sub-collection, over-explains its cosmology through repeated negation and formulaic substrate phrasing, and closes by reiterating an earlier Levitation-Charm insight instead of turning the widened cosmic scope into a sharper consequence.
